nested_container_backgrounds.message: Fixture: nested containers — mixed `background` (`gray` vs omitted / `none`).

mm_blocks.text: **Nested container backgrounds** — outer has no fill; inner blocks use `gray`, default, or explicit `none`.

content.text: Level 3 — inside gray parent; this container has no background (transparent over gray).
Level 5 — explicit `background: none` (shows parent gray through).
Sibling branch — no background, next to the gray subtree.

nested_scrollable_three_levels_small.message: Fixture: nested scrollable containers - root, 3 mids, 3 leaves each (9 leaves); all max_height small; 10 text lines per leaf.

mm_blocks.text: **Nested scroll regions** - root to 3 mids to 3 leaves each; every container uses max_height small (160px cap).

image_size_presets.message: Fixture: same image at each `mm_blocks` image `size` preset — auto through stretch.

mm_blocks.text: **Image size presets** — same logo URL below; each block uses a different `size` value.
First: **`auto`** — natural dimensions (no preset max width/height).
Next: **`stretch`** — capped at 500×350 px (legacy attachment-style banner).
